name: Whole-Wheat Granola
recipeInstructions:
Mix first 5 ingredients in electric mixer. Combine oil, honey, and orange juice and pour over mixture. Mix until completely blended. Spread evenly in a shallow pan and bake at 250°F for 45 minutes. Stir in coconut and almonds and bake an additional 30 minutes. Cool and stir in raisins.
1/2 cup serving - 227 calories  1 starch, 1 fruit, 2 fat exchanges.
27.9 grams carbohydrate, 4.7 grams protein, 11.9 gm fat
4 gm fiber  98.4 mg sodium, 189.1 mg potassium, 0 cholesterol
NOTE: To cut calories and fat, reduce the coconut and oil by a third.
